title: Senior Revenue Manager at Hilton India

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Hilton India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, Hilton India in Faridabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hilton India:
Hilton India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hilton India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
